title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
summary_full: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.
summary_public: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.
